languages.text: "А также право пользоваться ей имеет лишь Вольный Торговец или тот, кто обладает его визой. Это неоценимое вложение в вашу долговечность и... телесную целостность".
"In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."
languages.original_text: "А также право пользоваться ей имеет лишь Вольный Торговец или тот, кто обладает его визой. Это неоценимое вложение в вашу долговечность и... телесную целостность".

traits.locale_text: "In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."
"In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."
"In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."

languages.text: “此外，唯有行商浪人，或得到行商浪人授权的人，方能使用。为了您能长寿……且保持身体完整，这笔投资绝对值得。”
languages.original_text: "In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."

traits.locale_text: “此外，唯有行商浪人，或得到行商浪人授权的人，方能使用。为了您能长寿……且保持身体完整，这笔投资绝对值得。”

languages.text: «Además, solo {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente y las personas a las que autorice pueden usarlo. Es una inversión de gran valor en su longevidad e... integridad física».
languages.original_text: "In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."

traits.locale_text: «Además, solo {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente y las personas a las que autorice pueden usarlo. Es una inversión de gran valor en su longevidad e... integridad física».

languages.text: « De plus, {mf|seul le libre-marchand|seule la libre-marchande} ou des personnes qui ont son autorisation peuvent l'utiliser. Il s'agit d'un investissement inestimable pour votre longévité et... votre intégrité corporelle. »
languages.original_text: "In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."

traits.locale_text: « De plus, {mf|seul le libre-marchand|seule la libre-marchande} ou des personnes qui ont son autorisation peuvent l'utiliser. Il s'agit d'un investissement inestimable pour votre longévité et... votre intégrité corporelle. »

languages.text: "Buna ek olarak onu sadece Hür Tacir veya Hür Tacir tarafından yetkilendirilmiş kişiler kullanabilir. Bu, sizin uzun ömrünüz ve... Bedensel bütünlüğünüz için paha biçilemez bir yatırımdır."
languages.original_text: "In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."

traits.locale_text: "Buna ek olarak onu sadece Hür Tacir veya Hür Tacir tarafından yetkilendirilmiş kişiler kullanabilir. Bu, sizin uzun ömrünüz ve... Bedensel bütünlüğünüz için paha biçilemez bir yatırımdır."

languages.text: "Überdies dürfen sie nur {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} oder von {mf|ihm|ihr} autorisierte Personen benutzen. Sie ist eine unbezahlbare Investition in Eure Langlebigkeit und ... körperliche Integrität."
languages.original_text: "In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."

traits.locale_text: "Überdies dürfen sie nur {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} oder von {mf|ihm|ihr} autorisierte Personen benutzen. Sie ist eine unbezahlbare Investition in Eure Langlebigkeit und ... körperliche Integrität."

languages.text: 「さらに、このシステムは、不正取引担当者のみ、または不正取引担当者によって承認された者のみが使用できる。それは、あなたの長寿と...身体の完全性を守るための貴重な投資だ。」
languages.original_text: "In addition, only the Rogue Trader or persons authorised by the Rogue Trader may use it. It is an invaluable investment in your longevity and... bodily integrity."

traits.locale_text: 「さらに、このシステムは、不正取引担当者のみ、または不正取引担当者によって承認された者のみが使用できる。それは、あなたの長寿と...身体の完全性を守るための貴重な投資だ。」
